content:
I've recently started farming covenants starting with life drain, but I'm already running out of stamps. I've managed to get the main stats all correct and to max level. As as well 4 of the 6 pieces with 1 line of maxed out key flare substat and the other 2 pieces with 1 line of maxed out damage amp sub stat.  

So I was wondering where I go from here with limited stamps. Do I:
A- Continue to roll the remaining 2 pieces for a maxed out key flare sub stat. 
B- Not only roll for the remaining 2 max key flare sub stat, but also lock roll all 6 to get a decent second substat on all of them.
C- Just take the 4 key flare 2 damage amp maxed sub stats and move on to the next set. 

Also for whenever I stop with this set, what are the second and third sets I should be going for?  The main team I have been using is Calcus, Tawil, Hamlen, Gmurphy.
thread_title: Covenant help. Continue to roll, or move on?
